title: Global Influencers Gathered at #TeamGalaxy Connect 2026 in San Francisco
content: To celebrate the unveiling of Galaxy S26 Ultra and Galaxy Buds4 Pro, Samsung Electronics hosted the #TeamGalaxy Connect 2026 event in San Francisco. For three dynamic days starting February 25 (local  To celebrate the unveiling of Galaxy S26 Ultra and Galaxy Buds4 Pro, Samsung Electronics hosted the #TeamGalaxy Connect 2026 event in San Francisco. For three dynamic days starting February 25 (local time), the event served as a vibrant epicenter for global creativity and technological exploration.
